name: ICS Servo Manager
description: Set power, torque, punch, neutral and dead band on KO Propo RSx/BSx series servos over the ICS USB adapter.
notes: Portable exe - unzip and run, no installer. Covers RSx3/RSx2/RSx-one10/RSx-12 and BSx3/BSx2; the newer RSx4S/BSx4S are NOT PC-programmable (KO says so outright - use the Servo Model Selector or EX-NEXT real-time ICS). Requires the ICS USB Adapter HS plus KO Driver 2023, offered as a driver action. English and Japanese manuals ship inside the zip. KO publishes across two upload roots and the wrong one 404s with an HTML body, so do not hand-edit this path.
